summary: Tested Real Property Tax Declaration print functionality. Found comprehensive print system implementation but unable to complete full testing due to persistent authentication issues preventing access to Assessment tab where print features are located.

integration_issues.issue: Session management failing - user gets redirected to login page repeatedly after successful authentication
Cannot access Assessment tab due to authentication redirects, preventing print functionality testing

passed_tests: Found Data Entry page with proper navigation structure
Verified tabs structure (Property Information, Assessment, Reference, etc.)
Code review confirms print functionality implementation is comprehensive
PrintDocument component properly structured with A4 format
Print CSS properly configured for @media print
Signature blocks and footer sections implemented
Print button with data-testid='print-button' exists in code
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication session management. Users are being redirected to login page after successful authentication, preventing access to Assessment tab where print functionality resides. Authentication appears to work initially but session expires immediately or there's an issue with route protection. Need to investigate session persistence, token management, or protected route configuration.
success_percentage: Backend: N/A (not tested per request), Frontend: 30% (authentication blocking access to print features)
